title: Tala Stainless Steel Crinkle Chip Cutter Blade, Perfect Tool for preparing Potato's and Vegatables with a Crinkle Cut Design, The Wavy Design with Help add Extra Style to Cooks and Prepared Foods
features: CRINKLE CUT: This Tala Crinkle Cutter has a strong crinkle style Blade which is great for preparing all type of vegetables and perfect for Potatoes, adding texture and style to your dishes
ADDS VISUAL APPEAL: The wavy design not only enhances presentation but also helps foods cook more evenly and hold dips or seasoning better
GRIP HANDLE: The Plastic Handle helps grip the tool making it easy when cutting roots vegetables
EASY TO USE: Designed for comfortable handling and control, making it simple to achieve uniform crinkle cuts every time

TALA: The Tala collection of Kitchen gadgets and utensils includes a diverse which is perfect for everyday cooking and baking, established in 1899, Tala has become a trusted source of high-quality Kitchenware, Bakeware and Cookware
description: From the manufacturer About Us Tala is one of Britain's oldest and best-loved kitchenware brands, trusted by cooks all over the world since 1899. We have a rich history of manufacturing kitchen, home and utility wares. Tala has been manufacturing in England since 1899 and today many of our iconic products are still made by hand in England, by small teams of skilled people. We continue to strive to develop invaluable kitchen tools for beauty and efficiency. To buy Tala is to buy something underscored by generations of trust. It is a brand that has developed to meet the needs and wants of all homes to give the best quality in every product.
